title: Chocolate Fondant
description: A classic gooey chocolate fondant with a molten centre — perfect for entertaining and served with ice cream or caramel sauce.
context: A show‑stopping dessert we tried for a dinner party — warm and indulgent with melting chocolate at the centre.
steps: Brush the inside of moulds with melted butter and dust with cocoa powder.
Melt dark chocolate and butter together over simmering water and cool slightly.
Whisk eggs, egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
Sift flour into the egg mixture and beat together.
Fold the melted chocolate mixture into the batter until combined.
Divide batter evenly between the prepared moulds and chill for at least 20 minutes.
Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan / gas 6) and bake for 10–12 minutes until tops form a crust.
Let rest 1 minute, then loosen and turn out the fondants.
